---
title: "Plotting entropy"
output: html_notebook
---

A notebook for plotting shannon entropy.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)

#read in merged tsv
merged_tsv <- read_tsv("merged_columns.tsv") 

#create position column 
df <- mutate(merged_tsv, position = 1:length(merged_tsv$shanc...1), .before = 'shanc...1') %>%
  rename_all(~ str_replace(., "shanc...", "sample_")) %>% #rename columns to sample_n
  rename_all(~ str_replace(., "shan", "sample_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("sample"), names_to = "sample", values_to = "entropy") #arranges data into single column for for plotting

ggplot(df, aes(x=position, y=entropy))+
  geom_point() +
  #geom_smooth(level=.99)+
  ylab("Shannon Entropy") +
  xlab("Alignment Position") +
  ggtitle("Shannon Entropy") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,1.25))
  

```
